agreement_note: Cross-implementation agreement is not yet claimed. Current committed CI evidence shows TypeScript full 300-vector conformance, Python schema/import/smoke coverage, Go current test-gate coverage, and static browser artifact checks. Full Python, Go, Rust, JavaScript, and cross-implementation parity require separately committed reproduction records before release-green.

python.coverage: package import, profile constants, vector corpus shape/count/unique IDs, required vector fields, and signed-vector smoke sample V0001-V0003

static_browser.workflow: ProofBundle static verification / Proofbench static browser artifact check

implementations_tested.claim_boundary: Full 300-vector TypeScript conformance gate passed in GitHub Proofbench. This does not by itself establish cross-implementation agreement or release-green standing.
Python committed CI evidence is smoke/schema/import coverage only. Full 300-vector Python parity is not claimed here.
Go current test gate passed in GitHub Proofbench. Full vector parity is not claimed here.
Bridge-reported JavaScript standing remains standing data until reproduction records are committed.
Rust parity remains blocked by the context-commitment encoding issue and requires committed reproduction evidence.

blockers_for_agreement: Python full 300-vector parity requires committed reproduction records
Go full vector parity requires committed reproduction records or an explicit vector runner gate
Rust context-commitment encoding blocker remains unresolved
JavaScript/browser conformance requires committed reproduction records aligned with vectors_v1.json
Cross-implementation agreement requires comparable outputs from all claimed implementations over the same vector source
Release signing and external timestamp evidence are not committed
standing_boundaries: No universal cross-implementation agreement is asserted.
No formal proof closure is asserted.
Bridge-reported counts are standing data unless independently committed and reproduced.
